studyName: PROstate Cancer Medically Optimized Genome Enhanced ThErapy (PROMOTE) of Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer (CRPC) Patients Treated with Abiraterone Acetate

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, primary or metastatic tumor, primary tumor location, tumor stage, tumor treatment, treatment post visit, histological type, sequence center, and body site category where sample was collected [bone or tissue] of participants with castration resistant prostate cancer and involved in the "PROstate Cancer Medically Optimized Genome Enhanced ThErapy (PROMOTE) of Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer (CRPC) Patients Treated with Abiraterone Acetate" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: BODY_SITE_CATEGORY
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from Subject ID, consent group, subject source, source subject ID, and affection status of participants with castration resistant prostate cancer and involved in the "PROstate Cancer Medically Optimized Genome Enhanced ThErapy (PROMOTE) of Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer (CRPC) Patients Treated with Abiraterone Acetate" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, age, race, composite endpoint for progression after 12 weeks of abiraterone acetate chemotherapy, and sex of participants with castration resistant prostate cancer and involved in the "PROstate Cancer Medically Optimized Genome Enhanced ThErapy (PROMOTE) of Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer (CRPC) Patients Treated with Abiraterone Acetate" project.

variables.name: composite_progression
variables.description: Composite endpoint for progression after 12 weeks of abiraterone acetate chemotherapy (12-14 weeks or earlier if progression is suspected). The progression is judged based on PSA levels, radiography estimate progression, and symptoms assessments.

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and sex of participants with castration resistant prostate cancer and involved in the "PROstate Cancer Medically Optimized Genome Enhanced ThErapy (PROMOTE) of Castration Resistant Prostate Cancer (CRPC) Patients Treated with Abiraterone Acetate" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC
